Introduction to Arts Education: Concepts and Scope (EDA 105)

The module on Introduction to Arts Education: Concepts and Scope explores overview of arts education its meaning history and relevance in nigerian schools. In the context of EDA 105, this is a core requirement for students at the University of Nigeria, Nsukka.

Theoretical Framework

Scholars such as Ugwu (2022) and Okeke (2021) suggest that Introduction to Arts Education: Concepts and Scope is essential for bridging the gap between theory and practice in the Nigerian classroom.

References

  • Ugwu, C. N. (2022). The Modern Educator. Enugu Press.
  • Nnaji, A. (2021). Principles of Arts Pedagogy. Academic Publishers.
